resources.string: The game process exited unexpectedly (exit code: %1$d).
The game process crashed due to signal %1$d.
OutOfMemoryError detected (JVM heap exhausted). The game has been returned to launcher. Increase JVM heap max in Settings, or reduce enabled mods and try again.
No available app can share the crash report.
Selected renderer unavailable, auto-fallback to OpenGL ES2 (%1$s)
Controls GLFrameBuffer fallback (amethyst.gdx.fbo_fallback). Disabling it is closer to vanilla behavior, but may crash more easily on some devices.
Controls whether Downfall\'s DoubleEnergyOrb FBO compatibility patch is injected before launch.
Enables GLFrameBuffer\'s Virtual FBO experimental path (amethyst.gdx.virtual_fbo_poc). Helps avoid unknown framebuffer status crashes, but may affect post-processing effects.

Runtime-only global texture compatibility mode. Benefits: reduces black blocks and restores transparent-water rendering without rewriting jars or creating backup files. Tradeoffs: may soften some textures or change wrap behavior due to Linear/Clamp fallback, increase startup CPU/GPU work, and produce larger debug logs.

Controls -Damethyst.gdx.force_linear_mipmap_filter. When enabled, mipmap-based min filters are downgraded to Linear at runtime to avoid black blocks from incomplete mip chains in some mods. Disable for behavior closer to desktop vanilla.
